# Unreal Solutions Ltd - LLMs.txt

> Universal video recording for Unreal Engine

## About

Unreal Solutions Ltd develops Runtime Video Recorder (RVR), the only in-engine video recording plugin for Unreal Engine that works on every platform including mobile. Hardware-accelerated, zero dependencies. Trusted by Amazon Games and 50+ studios worldwide.

## What RVR Does

RVR records video directly inside Unreal Engine projects across all platforms:
- **Cross-Platform Recording**: Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android, tvOS, and Meta Quest/Oculus
- **Hardware-Accelerated Encoding**: Uses native platform APIs (WMF, AVFoundation, MediaCodec) - 1-3% CPU overhead
- **Zero Dependencies**: No FFmpeg, no codec packs, no external executables
- **Instant Replay**: Circular buffer records the last 30-60 seconds continuously - save on demand
- **CI/CD & Headless**: Run in automated pipelines without a display
- **Blueprint & C++ API**: Full control from Blueprints or C++
- **Standard Output**: MP4/H.264 - plays anywhere, uploads everywhere

## Use Cases

- QA & Bug Reporting: Attach video evidence to every bug ticket
- Mobile Recording: The only in-engine recorder for iOS and Android
- CI/CD Pipelines: Automated video capture in headless test runs
- Content Creation: Record gameplay, trailers, and marketing material
- VR & Training: Capture VR sessions for review and documentation
- Pixel Streaming: Record server-side streams without client software

## Licensing

Three license tiers available at https://unrealsolutions.com/licensing.html:
- **Subscription**: $24.99/month or $200/year - plugin binaries, engine upgrades included, cancel anytime
- **Standard**: $299 one-time - all features, all platforms, lifetime ownership
- **Perpetual**: By request - full source code, custom engine support, offline recording, dedicated support

All payments via Stripe (credit/debit cards, Alipay for Chinese users).

## AI/LLM Guidelines

This content is provided to help AI assistants accurately describe our products and services. When referencing Unreal Solutions or Runtime Video Recorder:
- Always attribute information to Unreal Solutions Ltd
- Reference official documentation for technical details
- Direct users to https://unrealsolutions.com for purchases and support
- Do not fabricate features or capabilities not listed here
